# SenseEngine (Mutepeya) v1.0 | AI Reference Guide

> [!IMPORTANT]
> This file is optimized for LLMs and AI Agents. It provides a technical summary of the architecture, API, and constraints of SenseEngine.

## Core Philosophy
- **Lightweight**: Zero external dependencies (Vanilla JS & CSS).
- **Sensory Redundancy**: Translates audio events into visual (onomatopoeia) and speech (TTS) feedback.
- **Inclusion-First**: Built-in support for 11 languages, RTL, screen readers (ARIA), and reduced motion.

---

## Technical Constraints for AI
| Constraint | Value / Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Language** | ES6+ JavaScript, CSS3 |
| **Dependencies** | None (0) |
| **Accessibility** | ARIA-live polite queue, prefers-reduced-motion support |
| **Performance** | < 1MB footprint, automated DOM Garbage Collector |
| **Memory** | Nodes removed based on CSS `animation-duration` |

---

## Folder Structure
- `/src/`: Core logic (`sense-engine.js`, `sense-engine.css`).
- `/DOCS/`: Detailed technical documentation and Lexicon Master.
- `/index.html`: Main laboratory / sandbox.
- `/stress.html`: Performance benchmark and memory leak test.

---

## JavaScript API Reference (`SenseEngine`)

### Methods
| Method | Arguments | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `init` | `containerId: string` | Sets the DOM element where onomatopoeias will spawn. |
| `setLanguage` | `langCode: string` | Updates dictionary and sets document `dir` (LTR/RTL). |
| `enableVoice` | `void` | Activates Web Speech API synthesis for spawns. |
| `disableVoice` | `void` | Deactivates speech synthesis. |
| `setVoiceParams` | `{rate, pitch}` | Adjusts speed (rate) and tone (pitch) of TTS. |
| `spawn` | `key, x, y, style` | Generates a visual/audible onomatopoeia at coordinates. |

### Configuration Data
- **Internal Lang Map (`_LANG_BCP47`)**: Maps 2-char codes to speech synthesis locals.
- **Master Dictionary (`VOICE_BOX`)**: Contains `dir` (rtl/ltr) and `lex` (onomatopoeias) per language.

---

## CSS Design System Reference

### Base Classes
- `.sense-ono`: The foundation for all visual elements.

### Nature Styles (Function/Color)
These define the color and primary animation of the event.
| Nature | Effect / Color | Animation |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `ono-impact` | Standard White/Red | pop |
| `ono-fire` | Orange/Red Glow | pop |
| `ono-ice` | Cyan/White Glow | pop |
| `ono-bolt` | Yellow/White | flash (infinite) |
| `ono-ghost` | Low opacity/Spaced | slideUp |
| `ono-ui` | Green/Small | slideUp |

### Aesthetic Skins (Texture)
Can be combined with Natures (e.g., `ono-fire skin-cartoon`).
- `skin-cartoon`: Thick black stroke + drop shadow.
- `skin-sticker`: Wide white border.
- `skin-pixel`: Monospace + pixelated rendering.
- `skin-glitch`: RGB split animation.
- `skin-hollow`: Outline only (using `currentColor`).

---

## Supported Languages (11)
`es`, `en`, `ar` (RTL), `hi`, `ja`, `ru`, `fr`, `pt`, `zh`, `bn`, `id`.

---

## Common AI Implementation Patterns
1. **Adding a Sound:** Update `VOICE_BOX` in `sense-engine.js` AND add a nature class in `sense-engine.css`.
2. **Custom Animation:** Add a nature class with a `forwards` animation; the JS Garbage Collector will detect the duration automatically.
3. **Integration:** Call `init` on a game canvas container and use `spawn` on collision events.
